transcript.text:
[Noodles for 1,000 Won?! (~$0.84 USD)]
[1,000 Won]
[Janchi-guksu (Anchovy broth noodles)]
[2,000 Won for Bibim-guksu (spicy noodles)]
[Special Janchi-guksu]
[All of this]
[Costs 11,000 Won?! (~$9.19 USD)]
That's amazing
So incredible
That's a belly?
[Done with the dishes]
Hello everyone
I came to Daein Market located in Gwangju
There's a place here that sells 1,000 Won noodles
I have never seen that before
They also have 2,000 Won Chive Pancakes

I'm going to go try them
[Jangtuh Guksu located in Daein Market, city of Gwangju]
Hello
[Sits down]
Here's the menu
It's really 1,000 Won (~$0.84 USD)
[They also have a special one too]
How many bowls should I get?
Spicy rice cake and blood pork sausage is only available at the night market
Well then, I'll take everything that's available on the menu
And also another round of all the noodles
Do you profit any money from selling them so cheap?
[Concerned]
A lot of people ask me that, but
I'm not doing this to make money
I do make some money if I sell a lot If not, it's okay too

[Let me show you 1,000 Won noodles]
[Dip in the broth]
[Chives garnish]
[Bean sprouts and sesame oil]
[Mix in that spicy sauce!]
[Spicy noodles]
[Special Janchi-guksu]
[Chives Pancake]
[1,000 Won noodle bowls]
[Don't you forget about me!]
[FIshcake soup]
Amaznig
Wow thank you
There's no more space left
Thank you
[Calculating]

11,000 Won! (~$9.19 USD)
That's just way too cheap
Bon appetit
Soy sauce here if it's too bland
I can use a little
I like eating everything salty
Feels like I'm eating the old traditional anchovy noodles
Chive pancakes this time
This only costs 2,000 Won
I would've bought this every day if it was near my house
With some soy sauce
Chewy and tasty
Let's finish this bowl first
[You are witnessing magic that makes the noodles disappear]
It's a mix of fishcake soup and anchovy broth?
Spicy noodles now

That's a lot of food
She's eating all of that by herself? Oh my lord
Smell of sesame oil
That's good
I have to eat this first before the noodles get bloated
This is the special one
Looks similar, except it has fishcake and boiled egg
Let's pour the soup in here
That's a lot of food
They give you a lot of noodles
It's this much
More than other places
I'll use this as a personal bowl
That's a lot of food
The spicy noodles taste sweet and delicious
This is with fishcake soup

With noodles
I feel like young students and elders can come here and have a nice meal for really cheap
It's good
[Her personal bowl lol]
Boiled egg
What's your name?
It's Tzuyang
Tzu-yang
This is a lot of food
I ate half and it's still this much left
The spicy noodles are so good
It's just what I like
Just like how mom makes it
I love the texture too
To be honest,
I've been wanting to try this place out

I was not able to because Gwangju is so far from where I live
Good thing I had a schedule near here so I had to stop by
How can she possibly profit from selling like this?
Still can't believe it
I'd feel sorry to pay for the amount on the bill
[Let's eat first]
[Scrape it all together!]
The spicy noodles are delicious
I feel bad to even do a food review
Fishcake is big too
It tastes good
Are you eating that alone?
Yes I am
She's so small though Where's all that going?
What do I need to search to see you?
It's Tzuyang

4.4 million subscribers
Take a pic for me
I'll be rooting for you Thank you
[He's letting everyone know]
[So we heard]
How many bowls are you eating?
Bowls of what?
Ramyun noodles
About 20 packs?
Oh my, that's crazy
Did you eat all of that too?
I'm still working on it
[Let's see]
8 bowls
How can you survive after that?
I can't survive if I DON'T eat like this

For goodness sake
I'll be back later Thank you
Eat a lot
But don't eat too much
Rip the pancake like this
[Get the spicy noodles ready]
Get them together
[Vacuuming]
[Satisfied]
There hasn't been a new customer since I came in
These markets used to be really crowded
Now it's just filled with restaurant owners
It's died down a lot because of the pandemic
There should be a lot of people in here if the noodles are this cheap
It saddens me to see places this empty
I put more sesame oil and dried seaweed

It tastes better with more sesame oil
Last piece
[Even the fishcake skewer]
[Emptied]
That's amazing
People will come here now after watching your mukbang
Incredible
It helps us a lot by you eating a lot
[She really came back]
Is that a belly?!
THIS is a belly
Oh my oh my oh my
Let's see each other again
Farewell
[Fistbump]
25 bowls next time

[I will try!]
[Finger Heart]
Thank you
I'm still shocked that there's a restaurant that sells 1,000 Won bowls of noodles
I had everything and it only costs 11,000 Won! (~9.19 USD)
[This can't be real]
I feel bad to be only paying that much
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
